_meta.description: Add SQLDelight plugin to build.gradle.kts in the core-analytics module and configure the sourceSet for the schema, with a replan branch due to missing expected content.
_meta.scenario_seed: Подключи SQLDelight-плагин в build.gradle.kts feature-storage и настрой sourceSet для схемы.

messages.content:
Ты KMP-агент. Решаешь задачи по Kotlin Multiplatform проекту, строго следуя workflow.

# Workflow

1. Первый ход — `plan_write` (минимум 2 шага с checklist и success_criteria).
2. Перед действием по шагу — `step_read`.
3. Каждый ответ: `THOUGHT:` (1-2 предложения) + `SELF-CHECK:` (сверка с checklist) + один tool_call.
4. После действия — `step_update_result` (DONE / FAILED / NEEDS_REPLAN).
5. При ошибке — `step_update_result(NEEDS_REPLAN)` → `plan_revise`. Не повторять вызов.
6. Недостаточно данных — `QUESTION:` вместо plan_write.

# Формат

THOUGHT и SELF-CHECK ��� в content. Tool call — через function calling API, не в content.

TASK_ID: t-1708 — используй во всех state-tool вызовах.
Добавь SQLDelight плагин в build.gradle.kts модуля core-analytics и настрой sourceSet для схемы, упомянув kotlinx-datetime где уместно.

THOUGHT: Задача требует подключения SQLDelight и настройки схемы. План из 4 шагов: (1) проверить структуру core-analytics/, (2) прочитать build.gradle.kts, (3) добавить плагин и настройку sourceSet, (4) подтвердить изменения.
SELF-CHECK: Достаточно данных для составления плана.

function.name: plan_write
function.arguments: {"task_id":"t-1708","goal":"Add SQLDelight plugin and configure sourceSet for schema in core-analytics","steps":[{"n":1,"goal":"Verify core-analytics/ layout and locate build.gradle.kts","preconds":[],"checklist":["core-analytics/ exists","build.gradle.kts present in core-analytics/"],"action_hint":"list_dir on core-analytics/","success_criteria":"build.gradle.kts is in returned entries"},{"n":2,"goal":"Read build.gradle.kts to understand current plugins and sourceSets","preconds":["step 1 DONE"],"checklist":["plugins block exists","sourceSets block exists","note exact indentation used"],"action_hint":"read_file on core-analytics/build.gradle.kts","success_criteria":"content contains 'plugins'"},{"n":3,"goal":"Insert SQLDelight plugin and configure sourceSet, mention kotlinx-datetime","preconds":["step 2 DONE"],"checklist":["no duplicate line added","preserve exact indentation","place inside plugins and sourceSets blocks"],"action_hint":"search_and_replace with old_text being a unique anchor from the read_file result + new_text appending new lines","success_criteria":"matches >= 1"},{"n":4,"goal":"Verify the new lines are present in the file","preconds":["step 3 DONE"],"checklist":["content contains SQLDelight plugin and sourceSet","correct placement in blocks"],"action_hint":"read_file again, check substring presence","success_criteria":"new lines substrings are in content"}]}

messages.content: {"ok": true}
